subject: How do I cancel my subscription mid-cycle?

messages.author: user
messages.body: I want to cancel my Team plan today. Will I get a refund for the rest of the month?

messages.author: agent
messages.body: Monthly plans aren't prorated on cancellation, but you keep full access until your next billing date. After that your workspace moves to Free automatically. To cancel: Settings > Billing > Cancel subscription.

messages.author: user
messages.body: After clicking Sign in with SSO our users get bounced back to the login page repeatedly. Okta shows the auth as successful.

messages.author: agent
messages.body: Almost always a NameID format mismatch. In Okta, open the Flowpoint app, go to General > SAML Settings > Edit, and set Name ID format to EmailAddress. Save and re-test.

subject: Automation ran twice on the same task

messages.author: user
messages.body: Our Slack notify automation posted two messages when I moved a task to Done.

messages.author: agent
messages.body: Known issue with rapid consecutive status updates firing the trigger twice. Fixed in 2.14.0 released March 12. Please upgrade if you're on an older self-hosted version; cloud customers are already on the fix.

subject: Can't upload 80MB video attachment in Safari

messages.author: user
messages.body: Uploads over ~50MB silently fail in Safari. Works in Chrome.

messages.author: agent
messages.body: Confirmed — fixed in 2.13.0. If you're still hitting it, hard-refresh (Cmd-Shift-R) to clear the old client.
